prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 3358→4276→6430→8750→8236，整体呈明显后移趋势，近 4 年累计后移约 4878 名；2025 年基准位次约 8236 名，较 2024 年小幅回升约 514 名；该校在河北省物理类计划 2021 年 53 人、2022 年 62 人、2023 年 56 人、2024 年 61 人、2025 年 53 人；2026 年计划 58 人，较 2025 年扩招约 9.4%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中央财经大学为 211、双一流高校，软科主榜 2026 年约第 42 名，近年排名稳中有升（2021 年 44→2026 年 42），财经类院校中仅次于上海财经大学；2023 年声誉偏负面（新闻传播学类专业投档位次大幅下滑）；抖音热度总排名第 97、评价"一般"，短视频曝光量处于同类院校中等偏下水平，报考关注度无明显升温信号；应用经济学 A、理论经济学 A-，在财经类院校中学科实力突出，与招生专业中的金融学类、财政学类、经济学类等高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 财经类专业整体社会热度近年呈分化观望态势，部分专 业（如金融、会计）仍保持较高关注；河北省 2026 年高考总人数约 60.98 万，较 2025 年略有增加，估算物理类考生约 35.55 万（较 2025 年略降约 2%），历史类考生约 25.43 万（较 2025 年增加约 4.3%）；省控线物理类本科批从 2021 年 412 分持续上升至 2025 年 459 分，反映整体竞争加剧；学校位于北京，对河北考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在河北省招生规模相对较大（物理类 50+ 人），属该校在京外主要生源省份之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移的大趋势、2026 年计划扩招约 9.4% 的缓解效应、财经类热度一般及抖音曝光量偏低、河北省考生总数略有增加等因素，预计 2026 年物理类最低位次约 8752 名，区间 8252–9252 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 金融学类（含金融工程、金融科技）
- 经济学类（澄明书院）（含经济学（数理经济与数理金融）、金融学（国际金融与公司理财））
- 统计学类（含统计学、应用统计学等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、信息安全、人工智能）
- 工商管理类（会计学院）（含会计学、财务管理、审计学）
- 大数据管理与应用（许国志大数据英才班）
- 财政学类（含财政学、税收学、资产评估）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 数学类（含数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）
- 投资学（含投资学、与大数据双学位项目）
- 保险学（北理工智能、保险联培）
- 税收学（北理工智能、税收联培）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 8252–9252 名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向（会计学院、计算机类、财政学类），一档专业（金融学类、经济学类、统计学类）作为冲刺；位次明显优于区间下限（<8252）可重点冲一档 王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>9252）建议以三档专业保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 3358→4276→6430→8750→8236, showing a clear downward trend overall, with a cumulative decline of about 4878 positions over the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 8236, a slight rebound of about 514 positions compared to 2024; the university's enrollment plan in Hebei Province for Physics Category was 53 in 2021, 62 in 2022, 56 in 2023, 61 in 2024, and 53 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 58, an increase of about 9.4% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion that somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Central University of Finance and Economics is a 211 and Double First-Class university, ranked approximately 42nd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable upward trend in recent years (44th in 2021→42nd in 2026); among finance and economics institutions, it is second only to Shanghai University of Finance and Economics; in 2023, its reputation was somewhat negative (the filing ranking for Journalism and Communication majors dropped significantly); its Douyin popularity ranks 97th overall, with a rating of 'average', and short video exposure is at a below-average level among similar institutions, with no clear signal of increased application attention; Applied Economics is rated A, Theoretical Economics A-, showing strong disciplinary strength among finance and economics institutions, highly relevant to the enrollment majors such as Finance, Public Finance, and Economics.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The overall social popularity of finance and economics majors has shown a trend of divergence and wait-and-see in recent years, with some majors (such as Finance and Accounting) still maintaining high attention; the total number of Gaokao candidates in Hebei Province in 2026 is about 609,800, a slight increase from 2025, with an estimated 355,500 Physics Category candidates (a slight decrease of about 2% from 2025) and about 254,300 History Category candidates (an increase of about 4.3% from 2025); the provincial control line for the Physics Category undergraduate batch has risen continuously from 412 in 2021 to 459 in 2025, reflecting intensified overall competition; the university is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to Hebei candidates; the university's enrollment scale in Hebei Province is relatively large (50+ in Physics Category), making it one of the main source provinces outside Beijing.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall trend of continuous decline in historical rankings, the mitigating effect of a 9.4% enrollment expansion in 2026, the generally moderate popularity of finance and economics majors and low Douyin exposure, and a slight increase in the total number of candidates in Hebei Province, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be about 8752, with a range of 8252–9252.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Finance (including Financial Engineering, Financial Technology)
- Economics (Chengming Academy) (including Economics (Mathematical Economics and Mathematical Finance), Finance (International Finance and Corporate Finance))
- Statistics (including Statistics, Applied Statistics, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, Artificial Intelligence)
- Business Administration (Accounting School) (including Accounting, Financial Management, Auditing)
- Big Data Management and Application (Xu Guozhi Big Data Elite Class)
- Public Finance (including Public Finance, Taxation, Asset Evaluation)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
- Investment (including Investment, Dual Degree with Big Data)
- Insurance (Beijing Institute of Technology Smart, Insurance Joint Training)
- Taxation (Beijing Institute of Technology Smart, Taxation Joint Training)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 8252–9252, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Accounting School, Computer Science, Public Finance) as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors (Finance, Economics, Statistics) as a sprint; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<8252), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (>9252), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中央财经大学为 211、双一流高校，软科主榜 2026 年约第 42 名，近年排名稳中有升，财经类头部院校地位稳固；2023 年声誉偏负面（新闻传播学类专业投档位次大幅下滑）；抖音热度总排名第 97、评价"一般"，无明显热度提升信号；应用经济学 A、理论经济学 A-，与历史类招生专业中的财政学类、经济学类、金融学等高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 财经类专业整体社会热度分化观望；河北省 2026 年高考总人数约 60.98 万，估算历史类考生约 25.43 万，较 2025 年增加约 4.3%，竞争有所加剧；省控线历史类本科批从 2021 年 454 分持续上升至 2025 年 477 分，反映整体竞争加剧；学校位于北京，对河北历史类考生有较强吸引力；2025 年历史类计划增至 30 人，为近年最高，2026 年维持 30 人，招生规模稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历史类位次近年波动较大、2026 年招生计划与 2025 年持平、河北省历史类考生增加约 4.3% 及财经类热度一般等因素，预计 2026 年历史类最低位次约 946 名，区间 804–1088 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 金融学（含金融学、金融学北外英语专业联培）
- 工商管理类（会计学院）（含会计学、财务管理、审计学）
- 经济学类（澄明书院）（含经济学（数理经济与数理金融）、金融学（国际金融与公司理财））。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 财政学类（含财政学、税收学、资产评估）
- 法学（含与会计学双学位、与工管双学位等 4 个专业）
- 经济与贸易类（含国际经济与贸易、国际商务、贸易经济）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工商管理类（商学院）（含工商管理、市场营销、人力资源管理、供应链管理）
- 财政学（财政理论与政策）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 804–1088 名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向（财政学类、法学、经济与贸易类），一档专业（金融学、会计学院、经济学类）作为冲刺；位次明显优于区间下限（<804）可重点冲一档王牌 专业；位次接近区间上限（>1088）建议以三档专业保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 578 → 700 → 1094 → 784 → 931, showing significant fluctuations overall, with a notable drop in 2023 (1094th place), a recovery to 784th in 2024, and a further decline to 931st in 2025; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 931st; the university's enrollment plan in Hebei Province for History Category was 23 students in 2021, 23 in 2022, 24 in 2023, 21 in 2024, and 30 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 30 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Central University of Finance and Economics is a 211 and Double First-Class university, ranked approximately 42nd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable and slightly rising trend in recent years, maintaining a solid position among top finance and economics institutions; in 2023, its reputation was somewhat negative (a significant drop in the admission ranking for Journalism and Communication majors); its Douyin popularity ranks 97th overall, with a rating of 'average', showing no clear signal of increased popularity; Applied Economics is rated A, Theoretical Economics A-, which are highly relevant to the History Category majors such as Finance, Economics, and Banking.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The overall social popularity of finance and economics majors is mixed and cautious; the total number of Hebei Province Gaokao examinees in 2026 is approximately 609,800, with an estimated 254,300 History Category examinees, an increase of about 4.3% compared to 2025, indicating intensified competition; the provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch has risen continuously from 454 points in 2021 to 477 points in 2025, reflecting overall increased competition; the university is located in Beijing, which has a strong appeal to History Category examinees from Hebei; the 2025 History Category enrollment plan increased to 30 students, the highest in recent years, and remains at 30 in 2026, with a stable enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant fluctuations in History Category rankings in recent years, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, an approximately 4.3% increase in Hebei History Category examinees, and the average popularity of finance and economics majors, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 946th, with a range of 804 to 1088.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Finance (including Finance, Finance-Beijing Foreign Studies University English Joint Program)
- Business Administration (Accounting School) (including Accounting, Financial Management, Auditing)
- Economics (Chengming Academy) (including Economics (Mathematical Economics and Mathematical Finance), Finance (International Finance and Corporate Finance)).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Public Finance (including Public Finance, Taxation, Asset Evaluation)
- Law (including dual degrees with Accounting, dual degrees with Business Administration, and 4 other programs)
- Economics and Trade (including International Economics and Trade, International Business, Trade Economics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Business Administration (Business School) (including Business Administration, Marketing, Human Resource Management, Supply Chain Management)
- Public Finance (Public Finance Theory and Policy).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 804–1088, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Public Finance, Law, Economics and Trade) as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors (Finance, Accounting School, Economics) as a reach; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<804), you can focus on reaching for top Tier 1 majors; if your ranking is close to the upper bound (>1088), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net.
